result.summary: Detected two visual layout and content issues on the webpage.

issues.description: The yellow action button in the top right header is completely blank without any label text.
issues.suggestion: Add the appropriate call-to-action text inside the yellow button container.

issues.description: The 'SCROLL DOWN' navigational indicator overlaps and obscures the promotional disclaimer text near the bottom.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the vertical spacing or styling to prevent the indicator from overlapping readable text.
